title: Dreamy Beds
description: This texture pack changes the beds to funny and beautiful ones so that you enjoy your sleep!
body:
# 🌙 DREAMY BEDS **Dreamy Beds** is a texture pack that adds **funny, cozy, and visually pleasing icons and designs** to the beds you sleep on in Minecraft. Each bed color features its own unique look, making your bedroom feel more lively and personal ✨ I’ve spent **over 10 hours** carefully designing these textures so you can rest peacefully and in style! This pack can also serve as a great alternative to [Fancy Beds](https://modrinth.com/project/hFoOkEdk).
In-game Preview ![All 16 beds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6df91577634d610f505b9fe8baf27405f5f2898a.jpeg) _This image is only for illustration purposes and the contents might change in the future_
--- ### ⚠️ Disclaimer _All textures in this pack are **100% made by me** without using external sources. The concept is **heavily inspired by Fancy Beds**, but all artwork is original._ - ❌ You **may not** use the contents of this pack in your own public pack **without proper credit**. - ✅ You are free to **modify or use this pack privately** for personal use. --- ### 🛠️ Installation Guide 1. Download the pack for your desired **Minecraft version**. 2. Launch Minecraft using the **same version**. 3. Go to **Settings → Resource Packs**, then click **“Open Pack Folder”**. 4. Move the **Dreamy Beds** texture pack into the folder. 5. Enable the pack in the Resource Packs menu. 6. ~~Useless~~ **MOST IMPORTANT**: Enjoy the pack and sleep in style! 😴✨
